evals.prompt: Regenerate the architecture diagram after adding new skills
evals.expected_output: SVG diagram regenerated reflecting new skills, agents, and commands in the project
assertions: SVG is self-contained and viewable on GitHub

evals.prompt: The architecture diagram is stale, update it to reflect current project state
evals.expected_output: Diagram regenerated from current .agents/skills, agents, and commands directories
assertions: removed skills are no longer shown

evals.prompt: Customize the diagram with a project title and pipeline colors
evals.expected_output: Diagram generated using docs/diagram-config.json settings for title and colors
assertions: config file is read if present
defaults are used when config is absent
custom title and colors appear in SVG
